product_overview: DevSync is a project management backend that provides secure user authentication and CRUD operations for projects, tasks, members, and documents via REST APIs. It is designed to support team collaboration, time tracking, and community features with a Node.js/Express/MongoDB stack.
core_goals: Provide secure user registration and login with JWT-based authentication
Offer CRUD APIs for projects and related work items to support team collaboration
Keep API design simple and consistent for easy integration with frontend clients
Support quick developer onboarding with clear environment setup and configuration
Return clear success and error responses to enable robust client-side flows

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Allow users to register and sign in to obtain tokens for authenticated actions. (Password reset/verification features are noted in README but are not present in the current endpoints.)
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signup with body {name, email, password} -> Receive 200 with UserObject
POST /api/auth/signin with body {email, password} -> Receive 200 with Tokens (accessToken, refreshToken)
POST /api/auth/signup with body {name, existingEmail, password} -> Receive 409 with error 'Email already exists'
POST /api/auth/signin with body {email, wrongPassword} -> Receive 401 with error 'Invalid credentials'

features.name: Project Management API
features.description: Authenticated CRUD operations for creating projects, retrieving project details, and adding work items to a project. All endpoints require a valid JWT in the Authorization header.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signin with body {email, password} -> Receive 200 with Tokens (accessToken)
POST /api/project/ with Authorization: Bearer {accessToken} and body {title, description} -> Receive 200 with ProjectObject
GET /api/project/:id with Authorization: Bearer {accessToken} -> Receive 200 with ProjectObject
POST /api/project/works/:id with Authorization: Bearer {accessToken} and body {workTitle, details} -> Receive 200 with WorkObject
POST /api/project/ with no Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/project/:id with Authorization: Bearer {accessToken} for non-existent :id -> Receive 404 Not Found
POST /api/project/works/:id with Authorization: Bearer {accessToken} for non-existent :id -> Receive 404 Not Found
POST /api/project/works/:id with Authorization: Bearer {invalidToken} and body {workTitle, details} -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Handles user authentication, registration, login, and password resets.

features.name: Project Management API
features.description: CRUD operations for projects, tasks, members, and documents.
